name: Pacific Century Premium Developments Limited
summary: Pacific Century Premium Developments Limited, together with its subsidiaries, develops and manages property and infrastructure projects in the Asia-Pacific region. The company also invests in residential and office buildings and properties; and provides professional property management, facilities management, asset management, and administrative services. In addition, it offers property leasing and sale agency, leasing and financing, travel agency, trademark registrant, ski operation, and hotel management services. The company is based in Hong Kong, Hong Kong. Pacific Century Premium Developments Limited is a subsidiary of Asian Motion Limited.
